name: Candidate-Conditioned Event Value Write
single_primitive: replace candidate-independent attention values with low-rank Phi(q,c_i,h_j) before ordinary event allocation
bilinear_reduction: every vector-valued bilinear Phi(z,h)=M(z)h pulls through the event sum and becomes a candidate-conditioned map of the ordinary pooled value
nonlinear_boundary: joint nonlinear Phi can avoid factorization but is exactly an edge-conditioned/dynamic-filter message function
no_history_contract: zero-valued NULL plus bitwise untouched base selection
post_write_contract: candidate-centred globally bounded hidden residual with small nonzero LayerScale
exact_contract: canonical exact recurrence is one coordinate inside the same softplus-monotone head
